package rulecoverage

func PositiveNestedLinearJoinMapCandidate() string {
    ruleID := "nested_linear_join_map_candidate"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Nested-loop lookups or joins that could use a map index for O(1) access."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
